header: All services unavailable 0700-0800 14th July and 0830-1230 on 20th July. Maintenance 0800-1700 16th July.
text:
On the 14th July between 0700 and 0800 all services will be unavailable. There will be a further 1.5 hours of at-risk time where the network connectivity may be interrupted for short periods of time.
There will be a longer outage on 20th July for 4 hours starting at 0830 running until 1230. Followed by 1.5 days of at-risk time where the network connectivity may be interrupted for short periods of time. The maintenance is scheduled to complete at 1800 on the 21st July
